art_highlights: Global art market grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6 billion, driven by high-value works (+$1M sales up 21%)
Dealer sales increased 2%, auction sales rose 9% in 2025
Primary market gender representation reached parity (50% of gallery artists are women)
Fairs remain critical (35% of dealer sales), online sales softening as collectors return to in-person

market_summary.key_drivers: Geopolitical tensions (Middle East), rising energy costs (Brent ~$99/bbl), Fed interest rate policy shift (only 1 cut expected in 2026)
market_summary.trend: U.S. equities under pressure; safe-haven demand strengthening USD; gold retreating from highs; small/mid-cap focus
